coreTruthSet.description: The fire is managed in a held state (neither extinguished nor actively fed), signaling controlled transition conditions.
coreTruthSet.quoteExcerpt: Not allowed to die. Not fed. Held.

coreTruthSet.description: The second matriarch reads environmental micro-cues (air weight, scent shift, mat temperature) as part of transition awareness.
coreTruthSet.quoteExcerpt: The air had changed ... lighter ... emptier ... The smell of the house had shifted.

coreTruthSet.description: Initial response behavior is grounded and procedural (listen, verify, move slowly), not performative panic.
coreTruthSet.quoteExcerpt: She did not move at first. She listened.

settingAnchors.name: Pre-Dawn Hearth Transition House
settingAnchors.description: Pre-dawn domestic interior where death recognition occurs through sensory continuity checks and controlled household rhythm.

continuityConstraints.title: Absence Detection Protocol
continuityConstraints.text: Critical transitions are detected by disciplined attention to missing rhythms (breath, warmth, micro-motion) before overt communal response.

continuityConstraints.title: Held Quiet Continuity Law
continuityConstraints.text: Household continuity under loss is maintained by held quiet and controlled heat rather than abrupt symbolic rupture.

continuityConstraints.title: Slow Verification Before Action
continuityConstraints.text: Legitimate authority response proceeds via slow verification and embodied confirmation before speech or broader coordination.

openResearchGaps.title: How does held-fire protocol function both practically and symbolically during transition periods?
openResearchGaps.description: Needed to align material practice with ritual meaning without over-abstracting.

openResearchGaps.title: What is the procedural order after first recognition of death in the household?
openResearchGaps.description: Needed to stage next-scene actions (notification, preparation, witness order) coherently.

openResearchGaps.title: What moment marks the second matriarch’s first explicit command after recognition?
openResearchGaps.description: Needed to define the shift from witness-recognition to active leadership authority.
